title: SharedInbox endpoint
description:
Implement SharedInbox per ActivityPub spec.

**Spec:** https://www.w3.org/TR/activitypub/#shared-inbox-delivery

**Requirements:**
- Add /inbox endpoint at instance level (not per-actor)
- Advertise sharedInbox in actor endpoints object
- Route incoming activities to correct local actors
- When delivering outbound, use remote sharedInbox when multiple recipients share a server

**Why:** Reduces HTTP requests when delivering to multiple actors on same instance. Standard optimization all major implementations use.
